learnerValue: Tests concise recall of the two specified targets of natural-hazard risk.
Distractors diagnose omission of either target.
Tests the complete source-supported set of desertification causes.
Distractors distinguish causes from risk-reduction strategies.
Reinforces the central balance between development and conservation.
Tests all landscape features required in the UK overview.
Distractors diagnose omission of relief or river systems.
Tests the complete set of considerations tied specifically to fieldwork design and collection.
Distractors distinguish these considerations from adjacent numerical skills.
Reinforces that geographical work draws on both primary and secondary sources.
Distractors diagnose omission of either source category.
Tests the exact qualities required of geographical conclusions.
Distractors distinguish conclusion quality from nearby writing and communication requirements.
Tests the audience-awareness required in geographical communication.
Distractors diagnose misreading “most” as “only” and reducing a range to one audience.
